projectDescription: Crowbar is a Windows GUI tool for GoldSource and Source engine modding that provides model decompilation, compilation, VPK package unpacking/packing, Steam Workshop publishing, and model viewing in a single application.
keyFeatures: Decompile GoldSource and Source engine MDL model files into QC, SMD, and related source files
Compile QC scripts using StudioMDL via a GUI interface with configurable options
Unpack and pack VPK and GMA game packages
Browse and preview model files via integrated Half-Life Model Viewer (HLMV) interface
Download and publish Steam Workshop items
Support for MDL versions 6 through 53 across GoldSource, Source, and Source 2
Batch processing for decompiling or compiling multiple files/folders at once
Per-game setup profiles with configurable tool paths
publicApiSurface: Decompile tab — MDL file/folder input, output path options, decompile options (QC, SMD, animations, physics, textures)
Compile tab — QC file/folder input, game setup selection, StudioMDL options, output path
Unpack tab — VPK/GMA package input, extract to folder, search within packages
Pack tab — folder input, create VPK/GMA output packages
View tab — MDL file preview via external viewer (HLMV or game viewer)
Download tab — Steam Workshop item ID/link download
Publish tab — Steam Workshop publish and update items
Set Up Games tab — manage game profiles (game name, engine, paths for compiler, viewer, packer)
Options tab — application-wide settings (auto-open, drag-and-drop, context menu)
Supported container types: VPK (v1 and v2), GMA (Garry's Mod Addon)
